<!-- ACTIVITY-SUMMARY-START -->
## Recent activity (last 12 months)

*Auto-generated weekly from commit history · updated 2026-06-21*

Over the past year, engineering effort has centered on building and hardening a sophisticated SaaS crypto trading platform, with deep work across backend resilience, billing, UX, and infrastructure. The primary codebase saw a major push to productionise the system: reconciling position state with exchanges, making the billing pipeline idempotent and configurable per mode, and adding self-monitoring alerts with dead-letter-queue replay. Simultaneously, a substantial research effort in Python explored crypto price prediction, iterating through hundreds of experiments with mixture-of-experts architectures and ensemble methods to push model accuracy. On the embedded side, custom firmware for ESP32-S3 HID emulation was refined across multiple hardware revisions, while a Windows kernel input filter driver was built from scratch for interception and injection of mouse and keyboard events. Secondary projects spanned Android TTS engine development with local model support, an on-device LLM chat application with sub-agent delegation, and a computer vision pipeline for poker table state extraction—each involving significant architectural design and integration work.
<!-- ACTIVITY-SUMMARY-END -->

<!-- ACTIVITY-TIMELINE-START -->
> **2026 Jun**
>
> - **Trading platform billing and resilience** *(summit)* — Built configurable billing modes, position-exchange reconciliation loops, and self-monitoring alerting infrastructure for the crypto algo-trading platform.
> - **Lightweight input automator** *(jolt)* — Bootstrapped a minimal AutoHotKey alternative with a scenario engine, condition evaluation, and Interception driver support for low-level input automation.

> **2026 May**
>
> - **Trading platform UX and ops hardening** *(summit)* — Polished UI with frosted-glass design, surfaced per-trader trade history, and hardened operations with crash-loop-safe message replay and resilient execution refunds.
> - **ESP32-S3 HID firmware** *(j-uni-hid)* — Developed new fire-and-forget emission patterns and an 8x8 matrix hardware variant of the custom mouse/keyboard emulation firmware.
> - **Windows input filter driver** *(input-driver)* — Added push-style event delivery and per-event blocking to the kernel-mode interception driver, alongside an integration test suite.
> - **Android TTS engine overhaul** *(j-tts-android)* — Integrated multiple local TTS engines including Piper and TeraTTS, added pitch control, and wired Russian text normalisation into the speech pipeline.
> - **E-ink tablet reading firmware** *(biscuit)* — Extended xteink device firmware with a knowledge base application, FB2 ebook reader, and Mesh Chat fixes.

> **2026 Apr**
>
> - **Trading platform admin and follow system** *(summit)* — Expanded admin billing surfaces, hardened follower position state machines with idempotent fanout, and added per-trader follow trade history.
> - **HID firmware USB and hardware variants** *(j-uni-hid)* — Continued iterating the ESP32-S3 firmware with USB protocol fixes and drafted a new v13 hardware variant.
> - **Windows Explorer tag utility release** *(intag2)* — Stabilised the release pipeline for the file-tagging Windows Explorer extension, fixing CI/CD workflows and preserving existing desktop.ini metadata.
> - **E-ink tablet firmware apps** *(papyrix)* — Built map and knowledge base applications, and optimised the tile renderer for Apple Silicon, for a custom xteink device firmware.

> **2026 Mar**
>
> - **Trading platform testing and billing** *(summit)* — Wrote end-to-end Playwright specs for admin and user flows, implemented win-mode fee reservation, and added maintenance-banner UX.
> - **Crypto price prediction research** *(crypto-model-research)* — Conducted a large-scale experiment campaign comparing mixture-of-experts and ensemble architectures, pushing combined F1 above 0.777.
> - **On-device AI assistant for Android** *(ozwil-android)* — Built sub-agent delegation architecture with router-first tool execution, KV-cache reuse, and multiple offline model integrations.
> - **Custom aim-assist utility** *(MEMU3)* — Rewrote the rendering overlay to D3D11, added linger-mode auto-fire, and integrated YOLO object detection for computer vision experimentation.
> - **E-ink launcher for note-taking** *(blackboard-launcher)* — Developed an e-ink-focused Android launcher with a drawing blackboard, status bar control, and gesture-based navigation.

> **2026 Feb**
>
> - **Trading platform infrastructure planning** *(summit)* — Maintained the platform with infrastructure planning and documentation of over-engineering cleanup and resilience findings.
> - **Windows Explorer tag utility CI** *(intag2)* — Refactored CI into discrete workflows for manual releases and Microsoft Store publishing, troubleshooting Partner Center API integration.
> - **Graph-powered code intelligence engine** *(jaxon)* — Added LSP integration, dependency injection pattern detection, and expanded multi-language parser support for the knowledge-graph code analyser.
> - **YOLO labeling tool initial build** *(yolo-labeler)* — Built a minimal web-based YOLO annotation tool with multi-select mark mode and batch operations.

> **2026 Jan**
>
> - **HID firmware v12 dual-core release** *(j-uni-hid)* — Released v12 of the ESP32 firmware with dual-core architecture and began work on new device support.
> - **Online poker CV pipeline** *(poker-cv)* — Achieved high-accuracy poker hand reconstruction from video, building a full pipeline from card detection to hand-history log generation.

> **2025**
>
> - **Trading strategy development** *(freqtrade_startegies)* — Heavily iterated on algorithmic trading strategies with hyperparameter optimisation, new signal formulations, and backtesting across multiple timeframes.
> - **Crypto model research beginnings** *(crypto-model-research)* — Initiated the price prediction modelling project with early experiments on ensemble methods and temperature scaling.
> - **Multi-session AI coding tool** *(auto-claude)* — Extended the autonomous coding assistant with squash merging, Git rules configuration, and worktree completion tracking.
> - **ESP32 firmware revisions** *(j-uni-hid)* — Shipped several major firmware revisions (v10, v11) with BLE/USB touch and mouse profiles, self-reporting, and reconnection stability fixes.
> - **Telegram automation tooling** *(freqtrade-tg-multibot)* — Built a multi-bot Telegram management tool with web application and Docker support for trading signal distribution.

> **2024**
>
